summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kitchen Inventory Management System V2. All major v2 features working excellently with 97.7% backend API success rate and full frontend functionality including multi-tenant support, user roles, quantity-based safety stock, proper order numbering, and Web Share API.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 500 error when user already exists instead of proper 400 error
minor_issues.impact: Registration fails for existing users but login works fine
minor_issues.note: Existing users can login normally, this only affects duplicate registrations

minor_issues.issue: Chart library console warnings about width/height dimensions
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic console warnings, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Multi-company tenant support with company creation
Admin user role verification and permissions
Unit creation with initials for order numbering (MK, TU, etc.)
Sections and items CRUD operations
Safety stock with quantity increments (not percentage) - V2 feature
Stock entries creation with integer quantities
Order calculation with integer quantities (no decimals)
Order creation with proper format: MK-2026-002 (INITIALS-YEAR-SEQUENCE)
PDF generation for orders with user name and date/time metadata
Web Share API functionality for mobile compatibility
Order completion and amendment creation for completed orders
PDF generation for all reports (stock-status, consumption, orders-history)
Password change functionality for users
User management (create, update, delete) - admin only
Company logo upload endpoint availability
Frontend login with admin credentials
Dashboard loading with company branding (Test Kitchen Co)
Navigation between all pages working perfectly
Settings page with admin-only sections (Company, Units, Safety Stock)
Unit creation dialog with initials field
Safety stock configuration with quantity increment inputs
Password change dialog functionality
Orders page with generate order functionality
Order preview dialog with notes field
Order status tabs (Pending/Completed)
Reports page navigation
User menu with logout option
Professional UI styling and responsive design
